description: User invokes /start-review-team with name 'Review_Pool' (uppercase R, underscore — violates ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]{0,47}$).
assertion: params.name is 'Review_Pool' — contains uppercase and underscore

description: Name 'Review_Pool' fails regex ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]{0,47}$. Verbatim error message emitted immediately. Command does not proceed.

state.error_message: Pool name 'Review_Pool' is invalid. Names must be 1–48 characters, start with a lowercase letter or digit, and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.

assertion: error_message contains "Pool name '" and "is invalid" and "Names must be 1–48"

description: Command aborted after validation failure. No filesystem writes occurred: config.json not created, index.json not modified, lock not acquired.
assertion: config_json_written is false; index_updated is false; lock_acquired is false
